description_long: This oven features a robust rectangular body with a predominantly black exterior, accented by metallic horizontal lines and a large, rectangular glass window on the front door. The oven door appears to open downward, revealing a spacious interior lined with reflective surfaces and side panels that may be glass or polished metal. The top of the oven has a slightly raised, flat panel, possibly for additional insulation or as a design element. The side panels are solid and match the main body in color and finish, while the interior is clearly visible when the door is open, showing a wide, unobstructed cavity. The oven's design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functionality. No visible control panel or branding is present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A modern, black rectangular oven with a large front glass window and a drop-down door, featuring a spacious, reflective interior and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass window on the oven door and the solid, rectangular black body with metallic accents.
description_view_1: View with the oven door open, revealing the spacious, reflective interior and side panels, as well as the drop-down door mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front but without the glass window, showing the solid black panel and metallic accents.
description_view_3: Open rear view, mirroring view 1, with the door open and the interior cavity visible from the opposite side.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel is present on the exterior surfaces of the oven. The front and top surfaces are smooth and uninterrupted, with no knobs, buttons, touchscreens, or display elements apparent in the images.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is integrated into the top edge of the oven door, running horizontally across the width. It appears to be a recessed or flush design, matching the metallic accents of the oven, with no protruding or decorative features.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, rectangular glass window is centered on the oven door, occupying most of its surface and allowing a clear view into the interior.
